description: Part 6/10: Add LAOL line management functions with FULL VISUAL drawing - dashed lines with labels, merge logic, cross-category merge, break detection, and scan-in-box functionality.
steps: Implement AddOrMergeLaolLine() function (f_add_or_merge_laol_line equivalent) - checks tolerance (mintick*2), merges if same level exists, creates new LaolLineData if not. Does NOT create visual object immediately.

Implement UpdateLaolLines() function (f_update_laol_lines equivalent) - checks if price crossed LAOL level (bear: price > level, bull: price < level). Marks broken, tracks break_bar. After LAOL_DELETE_DELAY bars past break, removes from array AND deletes the MT5 line/label objects. Returns break times and TF labels for all categories.
Implement MergeCrossCategory() function (f_merge_cross_category equivalent) - merges LAOL lines across entry/scalp/intra categories when at same price level

Implement ScanLaolInBox() function (f_scan_laol_in_box equivalent) - WITH FULL VISUAL DRAWING. When LAOL is found inside an established EM box: Creates a dashed line (OBJ_TREND) from bar_index to bar_index+offset (15 for entry, 30 for scalp) at the LAOL level. Color: blue for ENTRY LAOL, green for SCALP LAOL. Creates a label (OBJ_TEXT) at the end of the line showing 'ENTRY LAOL [tf_labels] in SCALP' or similar text. White text on colored background. Checks for duplicates before creating.
Implement LAOL line visual updates on each tick: extend the line's right side and move label position to stay at the end. Use ObjectSetInteger for x2 coordinate.
Implement LAOL line visual deletion when price hits the line level (the _xlaol hit detection from Pine Script)
Store LAOL visual objects in arrays (_xlaol_lines, _xlaol_labels, etc.) and manage their lifecycle
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 6/10 - LAOL line management with visual drawing'
acceptance_criteria: LAOL lines appear as dashed lines on chart at correct price levels
Labels show correct text (category, TF labels, box type)
Lines extend to the right on each tick
Lines are deleted when price crosses them
Merge logic correctly combines same-level LAOLs across categories
LAOL lines inside boxes are properly detected and drawn
verification: Read the LAOL functions and verify they match Pine Script logic
Verify OBJ_TREND creation with STYLE_DASH and correct colors
findings: Complete rewrite of STX_Edge.mq5 as single file (3177 lines). All visual elements present: zone boxes with blue/green/red colors, HCS boxes orange/blue, LAOL dashed lines with labels, RR boxes red SL/green TP, border style changes dashed->solid on retest. All algorithm logic: 25 TF pattern detection, TBE sequence, zone state machine, LAOL management, negation detection, S1-S4 + INTRA alignment, Final Entry signals. Braces and parentheses perfectly balanced. Alerts and SendNotification calls included.
